nasb.text: But they paid no attention and went their way, one to his own farm, another to his business,

esv.text: But they paid no attention and went off, one to his farm, another to his business,

cnv.text: 但那些人卻不理會就走了；有的去耕田，有的去作買賣，

ccb.text: 那些人却毫不理会地走了，一个去种田，一个去做买卖，

csbs.text: “但那些人不理，就走开了，有的到自己的田里去，有的做自己的生意去。
